items.name: Branchis' Spine
items.description:
𝘖𝘳𝘪𝘨𝘪𝘯𝘢𝘭𝘭𝘺 𝘢 𝘱𝘦𝘳𝘴𝘰𝘯𝘢𝘭 𝘪𝘵𝘦𝘮, 𝘵𝘩𝘪𝘴 𝘢𝘤𝘤𝘦𝘴𝘴𝘰𝘳𝘺 𝘸𝘢𝘴 𝘱𝘶𝘵 𝘰𝘯-𝘴𝘢𝘭𝘦 𝘧𝘳𝘰𝘮 𝘪𝘯𝘲𝘶𝘪𝘳𝘺. 6-2-25
────────────────────────────────
The farther someone goes into the "floating-point," the more jagged things tend to become. Sometimes, it is just a visual affliction. Unfortunately, it can lead to more gruesome results. Giving up halfway and returning from there will bring such abnormalities with them. To go further would make things worse.

items.name: First Aid Kit
items.description: It was hard, but you graduated college with a 4.2 GPA and got into a decent med school. Then you slogged through 4 more years of memorizing random facts. THEN you slaved away through 4 years of residency. THEN you got drafted by the army and make $45,000 a year. NOW you run around like mad, flinging medkits at your team mates just trying not to get shot. Yes. Law school was the right choice. You owned yourself.
